mapper.insert: INSERT INTO amz_replenishment_snapshot ( sid, seller_sku, warehouse_sku, warehouse_name, asin, principal_name, store_name, product_category, rating, review_count, ad_rate, profit_rate_30d, refund_rate_90d, purchased_qty, domestic_stock, pending_ship_qty, fba_stock, fba_inbound, total_inventory, sales_7d, sales_14d, sales_30d, sales_60d, sales_speed_14d, sales_speed_30d, sales_speed_60d, avg_monthly_sales, safety_stock, ship_qty, replenish_qty, restock_days, calc_time ) SELECT COALESCE(pl.sid, 0) AS sid, pl.seller_sku AS seller_sku, wd.sku AS warehouse_sku, ANY_VALUE(wh.name) AS warehouse_name, ANY_VALUE(pl.asin) AS asin, ANY_VALUE(pl.principal_name) AS principal_name, ANY_VALUE(COALESCE(sl.store_name, '')) AS store_name, ANY_VALUE(COALESCE(pc.category, '')) AS product_category, ANY_VALUE(NULLIF(pl.last_star, '')) AS rating, ANY_VALUE(pl.review_num) AS review_count, ANY_VALUE(op.spend_rate * 100) AS ad_rate, ANY_VALUE(op.gross_margin * 100) AS profit_rate_30d, ANY_VALUE(op.refund_amount_rate * 100) AS refund_rate_90d, COALESCE(MAX(wd.product_valid_num), 0) AS purchased_qty, COALESCE(MAX(CAST(wd.quantity_receive AS SIGNED)), 0) AS domestic_stock, COALESCE(MAX(wd.product_lock_num), 0) AS pending_ship_qty, COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_sellable), 0) AS fba_stock, COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_inbound), 0) AS fba_inbound, COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_sellable), 0) + COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_inbound), 0) AS total_inventory, COALESCE(MAX(rs.sales_7d), 0) AS sales_7d, COALESCE(MAX(rs.sales_14d), 0) AS sales_14d, COALESCE(MAX(rs.sales_30d), 0) AS sales_30d, COALESCE(MAX(rs.sales_60d), 0) AS sales_60d, MAX(rs.avg_sales_14d) AS sales_speed_14d, MAX(rs.avg_sales_30d) AS sales_speed_30d, MAX(rs.avg_sales_60d) AS sales_speed_60d, ROUND((COALESCE(MAX(rs.avg_sales_14d),0)*0.5 + COALESCE(MAX(rs.avg_sales_30d),0)*0.4 + COALESCE(MAX(rs.avg_sales_60d),0)*0.1) * 30, 2) AS avg_monthly_sales, ROUND((COALESCE(MAX(rs.avg_sales_14d),0)*0.5 + COALESCE(MAX(rs.avg_sales_30d),0)*0.4 + COALESCE(MAX(rs.avg_sales_60d),0)*0.1) * 90, 2) AS safety_stock, ROUND((COALESCE(MAX(rs.avg_sales_14d),0)*0.5 + COALESCE(MAX(rs.avg_sales_30d),0)*0.4 + COALESCE(MAX(rs.avg_sales_60d),0)*0.1) * 90, 2) - (COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_sellable),0) + COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_inbound),0)) AS ship_qty, ROUND((COALESCE(MAX(rs.avg_sales_14d),0)*0.5 + COALESCE(MAX(rs.avg_sales_30d),0)*0.4 + COALESCE(MAX(rs.avg_sales_60d),0)*0.1) * 120, 2) - COALESCE(MAX(wd.product_valid_num),0) - COALESCE(MAX(CAST(wd.quantity_receive AS SIGNED)),0) - (COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_sellable),0) + COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_inbound),0)) - COALESCE(MAX(wd.product_lock_num),0) AS replenish_qty, ROUND(((COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_sellable),0) + COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_inbound),0)) - ((COALESCE(MAX(rs.avg_sales_14d),0)*0.5 + COALESCE(MAX(rs.avg_sales_30d),0)*0.4 + COALESCE(MAX(rs.avg_sales_60d),0)*0.1) * 120 - COALESCE(MAX(wd.product_valid_num),0) - COALESCE(MAX(CAST(wd.quantity_receive AS SIGNED)),0) - (COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_sellable),0) + COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_inbound),0)) - COALESCE(MAX(wd.product_lock_num),0))) / NULLIF((COALESCE(MAX(rs.avg_sales_14d),0)*0.5 + COALESCE(MAX(rs.avg_sales_30d),0)*0.4 + COALESCE(MAX(rs.avg_sales_60d),0)*0.1), 0), 2) AS restock_days, NOW() AS calc_time FROM amz_warehouse_inventory_detail wd LEFT JOIN amz_product_listing pl ON pl.local_sku = wd.sku AND pl.status = 1 LEFT JOIN shop_list sl ON sl.sid = pl.sid AND sl.platform_code = '10001' LEFT JOIN amz_product_category pc ON pc.sid = pl.sid AND pc.seller_sku = pl.seller_sku LEFT JOIN amz_order_profit op ON op.sid = pl.sid AND op.seller_sku = pl.seller_sku LEFT JOIN amz_restock_summary rs ON rs.sid = pl.sid AND rs.msku = pl.seller_sku LEFT JOIN warehouse wh ON wh.wid = wd.wid GROUP BY COALESCE(pl.sid, 0), pl.seller_sku, wd.sku
mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.sid, s.seller_sku, s.warehouse_sku, s.warehouse_name, s.asin, s.principal_name, s.store_name, COALESCE(o.product_category, s.product_category) AS product_category, s.rating, s.review_count, s.ad_rate, s.profit_rate_30d, s.refund_rate_90d, COALESCE(o.manual_purchased_qty, s.purchased_qty) AS purchased_qty, s.domestic_stock, s.pending_ship_qty, s.fba_stock, s.fba_inbound, s.total_inventory, s.sales_7d, s.sales_14d, s.sales_30d, s.sales_60d, s.sales_speed_14d, s.sales_speed_30d, s.sales_speed_60d, s.avg_monthly_sales, s.safety_stock, s.ship_qty, s.replenish_qty, s.restock_days, s.calc_time FROM amz_replenishment_snapshot s LEFT JOIN amz_replenishment_override o ON CAST(s.sid AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = o.sid AND s.seller_sku = o.seller_sku
and s.store_name in #{it} and s.store_name like concat('%', #{storeName}, '%')
and s.seller_sku like concat('%', #{sellerSku}, '%') and s.warehouse_sku like concat('%', #{warehouseSku}, '%') and s.asin like concat('%', #{asin}, '%') and s.principal_name like concat('%', #{principalName}, '%') and COALESCE(o.product_category, s.product_category) like concat('%', #{productCategory}, '%') and s.warehouse_name like concat('%', #{warehouseName}, '%')

select distinct t.`${column}` from amz_replenishment_snapshot t where t.`${column}` is not null and t.`${column}` != '' and t.`${column}` like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by t.`${column}` limit 50

SELECT s.id, s.sid, s.seller_sku, s.warehouse_sku, s.warehouse_name, s.asin, s.principal_name, s.store_name, COALESCE(o.product_category, s.product_category) AS product_category, s.rating, s.review_count, s.ad_rate, s.profit_rate_30d, s.refund_rate_90d, COALESCE(o.manual_purchased_qty, s.purchased_qty) AS purchased_qty, s.domestic_stock, s.pending_ship_qty, s.fba_stock, s.fba_inbound, s.total_inventory, s.sales_7d, s.sales_14d, s.sales_30d, s.sales_60d, s.sales_speed_14d, s.sales_speed_30d, s.sales_speed_60d, s.avg_monthly_sales, s.safety_stock, s.ship_qty, s.replenish_qty, s.restock_days, s.calc_time FROM amz_replenishment_snapshot s LEFT JOIN amz_replenishment_override o ON CAST(s.sid AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = o.sid AND s.seller_sku = o.seller_sku
and s.store_name like concat('%', #{storeName}, '%') and s.seller_sku like concat('%', #{sellerSku}, '%') and s.warehouse_sku like concat('%', #{warehouseSku}, '%') and s.asin like concat('%', #{asin}, '%') and s.principal_name like concat('%', #{principalName}, '%') and COALESCE(o.product_category, s.product_category) like concat('%', #{productCategory}, '%')

choose.otherwise: order by CASE WHEN s.seller_sku IS NULL OR s.seller_sku = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, s.store_name asc, s.seller_sku asc
